subcodes.title: Words to Arthur Agnew et al, spoken on 1907-04-14
subcodes.first_line: This kind of food is not Persian. It is European... There is no grape in the Kingdom. This is a symbol or sign of the Word of God. The intoxication of this wine is such that it will be seen.
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @power of the Manifestation of God
